name: backdated-daily-submission
description: Activity Date in a manually seeded prior Week. Verify Week assignment, XP date source, WAS linkage — no accidental current-week assignment.
prerequisites: Second manually seeded Week with Start/End covering backdate

expected_links.Submissions.Week: prior seeded week RID (not foundation current week unless dates overlap)

prohibited_side_effects: XP Activity Date ignoring Activity Date
cleanup_instructions: Keep prior Week for repeat tests
manual_requirements: Mike/ops seed a prior Week if missing

known_evidence.blocker: Only Foundation Week recVDKiYATgzsfpmE confirmed for post-reset testing window
